assets.alt: Flat sales-call note passing through a privacy shield into a clean post idea card on a mint mesh background
assets.caption: Sales calls create useful content inputs only after private customer details are abstracted out.
assets.generation_method: built-in image_gen, saved post-local as PNG, converted to WebP, and optimized as PNG fallback
assets.notes: Flat head-on Sell In Public liquid-glass hero. The image uses a mint and pale teal mesh background, one call-note panel, one privacy shield, and one post-idea panel with non-readable marks.
assets.final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: wide blog hero for Sell In Public blog, final should work as a 1600x700 landscape hero.
Source context from article: This article teaches B2B sales and marketing teams how to turn real sales-call inputs into employee LinkedIn post ideas without exposing customer details. The useful raw material is the buyer question, objection, phrase, proof request, or explanation moment. The workflow removes customer names, deal details, pricing, contract terms, security concerns, roadmap context, and personal data before drafting. The finished idea is routed to the employee with standing to explain it, such as an AE, SDR, founder, solutions engineer, product marketer, customer success lead, or sales leader.
Primary request: Create one simple visual metaphor inferred from the article source context: a private sales-call note being safely abstracted into an employee content idea. Use one or two relevant visual elements only: one front-facing flat call-note panel with abstract non-readable lines, and one cleaner public post-idea panel, separated by a simple privacy shield or soft filter shape. Do not mimic exact LinkedIn UI.
Style reference: Sell In Public Flat Liquid Mesh Hero style. Generated raster PNG. Background uses one main color plus at most one close complementary color. Matte translucent liquid-glass shapes. Simple head-on flat UI. Consistent white outline weight. Clean negative space. Subtle grain.
Composition: Wide landscape hero near 1600x700. One centered head-on graphic with quiet space around it. All glass/white graphics must be completely flat and viewed straight-on, like a 2D interface parallel to the image plane.
Scene/backdrop: Soft mesh gradient using only cool mint and pale teal. No third color family. Blend smoothly without hard edges.
Subject: Two simple front-facing flat liquid-glass panels: a private call note on the left and a cleaner public idea card on the right, with one simple translucent shield/filter shape between them. Sparse non-readable white lines only.
Detail density: Very low. Simple, spacious, specific, editorial B2B.
Constraints: Generated raster PNG style only. No readable text, logos, watermarks, exact LinkedIn UI, fake metrics, numbers, charts, scattered nodes, random lines, icon clouds, fake dashboards, overcomplicated UIs, generic LinkedIn-post-card default, glossy 3D objects, glow, bloom, flares, light trails, shiny/specular/reflection cues, bokeh/orbs, hard gradient edges, SVG/vector look, photoreal stock-photo look, more than two background colors, angled perspective, isometric view, tilted panels, 3D depth, shadows, or three-quarter UI view.
